questions: Should bulk 'Start time' editing be supported? Setting all clips to the same start time would stack them — likely undesirable. The plan excludes it, but relative offset adjustment ('shift all by +1s') could be useful. Which behavior do you want?

For the Text tab in bulk mode: should editing text content be supported (applying same text to all selected text clips), or only font size and color? Mixed content editing is confusing but 'set all captions to same font size' is clearly useful.

Copy/paste for clips: is this an existing feature? The context menu currently has no copy option even for single clips. Should this plan include implementing copy/paste, or just split/mute/delete for batch context menu?

For position fields in bulk mode: should editing X/Y apply the exact same value to all clips (stacking them), or should it apply a relative delta ('move all 50px right')? Delta mode is more useful but requires different UX (e.g., +/- buttons or a 'nudge' input).
success_criteria: BulkClipPanel shows tabbed UI matching ClipPanel's structure (Effects, Timing, Position, Audio, Text tabs) when 2+ clips are selected
All applicable ClipMeta fields are editable in bulk: entrance/exit/continuous effects, speed, from/to, x/y/width/height, opacity, volume, text fontSize/color
Mixed values display 'Mixed' placeholder; editing a field applies the new value to all selected clips
Tab visibility is determined by the union of selected clip types (e.g., Audio tab only if any clip is on an audio track)
Arrow up/down keys move ALL selected clips to adjacent track of matching kind
Context menu shows 'Split at Playhead' for multi-select (splits each clip that intersects playhead)
TypeScript compiles without errors after all changes
Undo correctly reverts bulk edits for all affected clips
assumptions: Bulk 'Start time' editing is excluded — too destructive (stacks clips). Only speed/from/to from the Timing tab are exposed in bulk mode.
Text content editing is excluded from bulk mode — only fontSize and color are bulk-editable. Content is too clip-specific.
Copy/paste is out of scope for this plan — the context menu expansion covers split-at-playhead, mute, and delete for batch.
Position fields apply absolute values (not deltas) in bulk mode, matching ClipPanel behavior. A delta/nudge mode can be added later.
The existing `handleUpdateClips` mutation path handles all ClipMeta fields including nested objects (entrance, exit, continuous, text) — no backend changes needed.
Custom effect editor is shown in bulk mode only when all selected clips share the same custom effect slug; otherwise hidden.
Reset Position in bulk mode clears x/y/width/height/crop for ALL selected clips.
Multi-drag ghost feedback (showing outlines for all dragged clips) is a nice-to-have — if the current count badge + highlight is sufficient, Step 6 can be skipped.
structure_warnings: Each step section should reference at least one file in backticks.
